history.qwen_observation: Recipe validation failed because parameterized recipes were passed as colon-delimited strings instead of mapping objects with explicit name and parameter fields.
history.qwen_rationale: OpenRewrite requires parameterized recipes to be expressed as JSON mappings with a 'name' key and explicit parameter keys (e.g., groupId, artifactId, newVersion for UpgradeDependencyVersion; key, newValue for ChangePropertyValue). Converting all parameterized recipes to this mapping format will allow the chain to validate and execute correctly.

history.qwen_observation: The upgrade_spring_boot_to_3_3 step failed because Spring Boot 3.3 dependencies are compiled for Java 17 (class file version 61), but the build was executed under JDK 11 (class file version 55), causing a version mismatch compilation error.
history.qwen_rationale: Spring Boot 3.x strictly requires Java 17+. By changing the JDK for the upgrade_spring_boot_to_3_3 step from 11 to 17, the compiler will be able to read the upgraded Spring Boot 3.3 class files. The chain otherwise follows the recommended Spring Boot 2.x → 3.x migration path, stepping through 2.7 first for stability before jumping to 3.3 under JDK 17.
